title: Infant Killed as Israeli Military Fires on Car in West Bank, Palestinian Officials Say
summary_full: Israel’s military said a soldier opened fire after Israeli troops “perceived a vehicle accelerating toward them.” The baby’s grandmother, who was in the car, disputed that account.
summary_public: Israel’s military said a soldier opened fire after Israeli troops “perceived a vehicle accelerating toward them.” The baby’s grandmother, who was in the car, disputed that account.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Infant Killed as Israeli Military Fires on Car
